name: Motion One (Web Animations API Wrapper)
pricing_notes: Open source (MIT); Matt Perry (Framer Motion creator)

performance.notes: Web Animations API — GPU-accelerated, off main thread; faster than JS-based animation

agent_readiness.notes: Tiny animation library using Web Animations API. animate(element, {x: 100}, {duration: 0.5}). scroll() for scroll-driven animations. timeline() for sequencing. stagger() for list animations. Easing functions. Spring animations. TypeScript. 1.5KB smaller than GSAP. By the creator of Framer Motion. Framework-agnostic (no React required unlike Framer Motion). Motion for React is the Framer Motion v11 rebranding. Works with any CSS property. GPU-accelerated via WAAPI.

gotchas: Web Animations API support varies (polyfill needed for old browsers)
Not as feature-rich as GSAP for complex timelines
best_when: Framework-agnostic web animations using standard Web APIs
Small bundle size requirement vs GSAP
summary: Motion One (now 'motion') is a tiny animation library using the native Web Animations API. animate(), scroll(), timeline(), stagger(). GPU-accelerated, off main thread. Framework-agnostic. Created by Framer Motion author Matt Perry. 1.5KB vs GSAP's larger footprint. Best for framework-agnostic scroll-driven animations and simple element transitions. Use Framer Motion for React-specific declarative animations, GSAP for complex timelines.
